UpdateBaseDdosThreshold.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [Idempotency](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateBaseDdosThreshold.thresholdType: Scrubbing threshold setting type, including bandwidth cap (bandwidth), intelligent threshold (auto), and manual setting (manual)
UpdateBaseDdosThreshold.ipCleanMbps: Traffic bandwidth in Mbps per second, minimum 120 Mbps, maximum 5000 Mbps (required when thresholdType is manual)
UpdateBaseDdosThreshold.ipCleanPps: Packet rate in pps per second, minimum 58594 pps, maximum 4882813 pps (required when thresholdType is manual)
